section_name: Commercial Motor Vehicle Used Primarily for Agricultural Purposes; Offense
text:
(a) The owner of a commercial motor vehicle registered under Section 502.433 (Fee: Commercial Farm Motor Vehicle) commits an offense if the person uses or permits the use of the vehicle for a purpose other than one allowed under Section 502.433 (Fee: Commercial Farm Motor Vehicle) . Each use or permission of use in violation of this section is a separate offense.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $25 or more than $200.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.478 — Commercial Motor Vehicle Used Primarily for Agricultural Purposes; Offense

(a) The owner of a commercial motor vehicle registered under Section 502.433 (Fee: Commercial Farm Motor Vehicle) commits an offense if the person uses or permits the use of the vehicle for a purpose other than one allowed under Section 502.433 (Fee: Commercial Farm Motor Vehicle) . Each use or permission of use in violation of this section is a separate offense.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $25 or more than $200.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 160, eff. January 1, 2012.*

Each use or permission of use in violation of this section is a separate offense.

subsections.text: An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $25 or more than $200.
